title: Verdict
description: CONSUMED STUB — owned by Noetica (Law 15). RM1 pins this envelope until the real Noetica contract publishes. The envelope is domain-generic; MP fills status/reason_codes from its OWN closed taxonomies (manufacturing/manufacturability.schema.json). is_error carries Noetica's outcome/error distinction: RM1 maps INFRA_ERROR -> is_error:true (no episode), all others -> is_error:false. MP must not extend this envelope (Law 6).

status.description: Domain taxonomy string; RM1 constrains it to ManufacturabilityVerdictStatus at the manufacturing boundary.
